title: Visual Communication Design Master Program Publications and Dissertations
content:
Visual Communication Design Master Program Publications and Dissertations

MASTER THESES

(Master Thesis) Orhan, Zübeyde (2024). Astrologers' Instagram Uses in the Context of Digital Capitalism. Üsküdar University, Institute of Social Sciences, Department of Visual Communication Design, Istanbul.

(Master Thesis) Alim, Adem Ali (2023). User Experience And Design in Mobile Apps: Examples of Amazon Prime, Netflix And Exxen. Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Science Visual Communication Design Department. Master Thesis. İstanbul. (Adviser: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Tolga Erkan).

(Master Thesis) Bayar, Gürkan (2023). Investigation of Mobile Health Applications Within User Interface Design. Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Science Visual Communication Design Department. Master Thesis. İstanbul. (Adviser: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Tolga Erkan).

(Master Thesis) Jaber, Dua Mohhamad Ali (2023). A Research on The İmpact of Remote Working on Visual Communication Designers And The Possibility of Turning into A Virtual Design Office in The Near Future. Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Science Visual Communication Design Department. Master Thesis. İstanbul. (Adviser: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Tolga Erkan).

(Master Thesis) Keleş, Belis (2023). Consumer Social Media Usage Practices: A Research on Instagram Example. Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Science Visual Communication Design Department. Master Thesis. İstanbul. (Adviser: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Tolga Erkan).

(Master Thesis) Demir, Hatice Kader (2023). The Effect of Booklet Label Design And Applications On Consumer Purchasing Behavior And Decisions. Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Science Visual Communication Design Department. Master Thesis. İstanbul. (Adviser: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Tolga Erkan).

(Master Thesis) Korkunç, Emrah (2022). Analysis of Software Used in Two-Dimensional (2D) Character Animation Production in the Context of Motion Design. Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Science Visual Communication Design Department. Master Thesis. İstanbul. (Adviser: Assoc. Prof. Dr. İpek Fatma Çevik).

(Master Thesis) Evran, Bilgi (2021). Use of Augmented Reality Technology in the Fashion Industry. Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Science Visual Communication Design Department. Master Thesis. İstanbul. (Adviser: Prof. Dr. Hatice Öz Pektaş).

MASTER PROJECTS

(Master Non-Thesis Project) Şekerli, Meliha. (2022). The Effects of Metaverse Exhibition Space Designs on the Dissemination of Digital Artworks. Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Science Visual Communication Design Department. Master Project. İstanbul. (Adviser: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Tolga Erkan).

(Master Non-Thesis Project) Vahidoğlu, Nihal. (2023). Presentation of Gender Elements in Turkish TV Series: The Case of Aşk-ı Memnu. Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Science Visual Communication Design Department. Master Project. İstanbul. (Adviser: Prof. Dr. And Algül).

(Master Non-Thesis Project) Özdemir, Muhammet Furkan (2022). NFT in the Digital World and What it brings to the Field. Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Science Visual Communication Design Department. Master Project. İstanbul. (Adviser: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Tolga Erkan).

(Master Non-Thesis Project) Canpolat, Fadime (2022). Facilitating the Use of Supplements for Preschool Children with Augmented Reality Application. Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Science Visual Communication Design Department. Master Project. İstanbul. (Adviser: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Dinçer Atlı).
